title: lepidagathis glandulosa
intro: Lepidagathis glandulosa, also known as the glandular lepidagathis, is a species of plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepidagathis glandulosa include its potential to treat various conditions, such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Lepidagathis glandulosa is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
